Operation 'newPSP' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description is identical to summary and lacks essential details. Improved version explains the purpose (displaying monitor status), expected inputs (configuration parameters), return value (PSP object with ID and URL), and side effects (immediate public accessibility). This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.summary_suggestion: Create a new public status page
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new public status page for displaying monitor status to end users. Accepts configuration parameters for the status page name, description, and associated monitors. Returns the newly created PSP object with a unique identifier and public URL. The status page will be immediately accessible at the generated public URL.
data.reasoning: Original description is identical to summary and lacks essential details. Improved version explains the purpose (displaying monitor status), expected inputs (configuration parameters), return value (PSP object with ID and URL), and side effects (immediate public accessibility). This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

message: Operation 'editPSP' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description is too vague and identical to summary. Enhanced version clarifies what can be edited, specifies the required PSP identifier input, explains partial update support, indicates the return value, and notes immediate visibility of changes. This enables AI agents to understand the operation's scope and effects.

data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing public status page's configuration including name, description, and associated monitors. Requires the PSP identifier as input. Supports partial updates - only provided fields will be modified. Returns the updated PSP object. Changes are reflected immediately on the public status page.
data.reasoning: Original description is too vague and identical to summary. Enhanced version clarifies what can be edited, specifies the required PSP identifier input, explains partial update support, indicates the return value, and notes immediate visibility of changes. This enables AI agents to understand the operation's scope and effects.

message: Operation 'deletePSP' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description lacks critical details about the destructive nature of this operation. Improved version specifies the required input (PSP identifier), explains the consequences (permanent deletion, URL inaccessibility), warns about irreversibility, and clarifies the response. This helps AI agents understand the severity and ensure they use this operation only when appropriate.

data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes a public status page and removes it from public access. Requires the PSP identifier as input. Once deleted, the status page URL will no longer be accessible. This action cannot be undone. Returns a confirmation response indicating successful deletion.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks critical details about the destructive nature of this operation. Improved version specifies the required input (PSP identifier), explains the consequences (permanent deletion, URL inaccessibility), warns about irreversibility, and clarifies the response. This helps AI agents understand the severity and ensure they use this operation only when appropriate.

data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing alert contact's configuration. Specify the alert contact ID and provide the fields to modify (e.g., email address, phone number, notification type). Returns the updated AlertContact object. Only provided fields are modified; other settings remain unchanged.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are identical and lack specificity. Added details about what can be edited, the requirement to specify contact ID, clarification that updates are partial, and what is returned. This helps AI agents understand the operation's scope and effects.

message: Operation 'deleteAlertContact' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks critical details about permanence, side effects, and what happens to dependent monitors. Enhanced version clarifies the destructive nature, input requirement (ID), and cascading effects for better AI agent decision-making.

data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes an alert contact by ID. The contact will no longer receive notifications. Returns confirmation of deletion. This action cannot be undone. Any monitors using this contact for alerts will no longer send notifications to it.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks critical details about permanence, side effects, and what happens to dependent monitors. Enhanced version clarifies the destructive nature, input requirement (ID), and cascading effects for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'getMWindows' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description provides no context about filtering, pagination, or return structure. Enhanced version explains filtering options, pagination support, and the structure of returned MWindow objects, enabling AI agents to construct appropriate queries.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of maintenance windows. Optionally filter by monitor ID or status. Returns an array of MWindow objects containing window ID, associated monitor, start/end times, and status. Supports pagination parameters for large result sets.
data.reasoning: Original description provides no context about filtering, pagination, or return structure. Enhanced version explains filtering options, pagination support, and the structure of returned MWindow objects, enabling AI agents to construct appropriate queries.

message: Operation 'newMWindow' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too minimal. Enhanced version specifies required inputs (monitor IDs, times), explains the operational effect (alert suppression), clarifies the return value, and describes the post-window behavior for complete AI agent understanding.

data.description_suggestion: Creates a new maintenance window for one or more monitors. Requires monitor ID(s), start time, end time, and optional description. During the maintenance window, monitors will not trigger alerts. Returns the created MWindow object with assigned ID. Monitors will resume normal monitoring after the window ends.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal. Enhanced version specifies required inputs (monitor IDs, times), explains the operational effect (alert suppression), clarifies the return value, and describes the post-window behavior for complete AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'editMWindow' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks specificity about what can be edited and when changes take effect. Enhanced version clarifies the window ID requirement, editable fields, return value, and the immediate effect of changes on active windows.

data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing maintenance window's configuration. Specify the maintenance window ID and provide fields to modify (start time, end time, description, or associated monitors). Returns the updated MWindow object. Changes take effect immediately; if the window is currently active, alert suppression rules are updated accordingly.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks specificity about what can be edited and when changes take effect. Enhanced version clarifies the window ID requirement, editable fields, return value, and the immediate effect of changes on active windows.

message: Operation 'deleteMWindow' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too brief. Enhanced version clarifies the destructive nature, specifies the ID requirement, explains the immediate effect on active windows (alert resumption), and confirms irreversibility for proper AI agent decision-making.

data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes a maintenance window by ID. If the window is currently active, associated monitors will immediately resume normal alert monitoring. Returns confirmation of deletion. This action cannot be undone.
data.reasoning: Original description is too brief. Enhanced version clarifies the destructive nature, specifies the ID requirement, explains the immediate effect on active windows (alert resumption), and confirms irreversibility for proper AI agent decision-making.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of public status pages (PSPs). Optionally filter by status or associated monitors. data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve all monitors with optional filtering
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all monitors configured in the account. Supports optional filtering and pagination parameters.
